infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Andro uses your location to suggest nearby races and show your position on the globe.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Andro needs access to your photos to set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Andro needs access to your camera to take a profile picture.

expo-camera.cameraPermission: Andro needs camera access to scan your race cards.
